config.name: Entropy Sweep: Cost of Existing
config.hypothesis: Higher entropy coefficients cause earlier civilization collapse and higher terminal inequality

findings: No collapses observed across entire entropy range
Gini coefficient moves from 0.5607 to 0.5782 (+3.1%) across entropy range
Mean population declines from 48.0 to 46.8 as entropy increases
Mean fitness shifts from 0.5423 to 0.5456 under increasing entropy pressure
